visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a pink polo shirt stands in a bright indoor studio-like setting. In front of her are two open boxes of Korean fried chicken. She smiles at the camera, gesturing towards the food. (2) She holds a small plate of corn cheese. Using a fork, she stretches the melted cheese, showing its texture. She then dollops the corn cheese onto a piece of fried chicken and takes a large bite, giving a thumbs-up. (3) The scene shifts as she prepares a small bowl of red Buldak noodles. She uses silver chopsticks to lift the noodles, showing their spicy coating, and proceeds to eat them while looking satisfied. (4) She picks up a piece of fried chicken and dips it generously into a small container of white yogurt sauce. She takes a bite, closing her eyes in enjoyment. (5) The location changes to an outdoor street during the day. She stands in front of a 'bb.q CHICKEN' storefront, holding a credit card and a branded shopping bag. She waves the card energetically. (6) The video cuts to digital interface shots showing an app with various brand logos and promotional banners for 'Taishin Point' and 'Korea Fun'. (7) Back in the indoor setting, she brings out a bowl of fresh green lettuce leaves. She places a piece of fried chicken inside a leaf, wraps it up, and eats the bundle, nodding in approval.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 韓國人教你. [Variety]: 韓式炸雞道地吃法. (2) [Slogan]: 1. 玉米起司 Corn Cheese. (3) [Subtitle]: 在韓國常常看到的「焗烤玉米起司」. (4) [Variety]: 偷吃一口. (5) [Variety]: 當然好吃. (6) [Variety]: +玉米的脆感 +起司的香濃好滋味. (7) [Slogan]: 記得用比薩起司做喔！真的太好吃子啦. (8) [Variety]: 9/10. (9) [Slogan]: 2. 火辣雞麵 Buldak noodles. (10) [Variety]: 帶一點辣味之後 變成越吃越上癮的味道. (11) [Variety]: 吃起司口味炸雞的時候 推薦這種辣味食物!. (12) [Slogan]: 但不敢吃辣的人請注意. (13) [Variety]: 8.5/10. (14) [Slogan]: 3. 蜂蜜優格醬 Yogurt sauce. (15) [Variety]: 在起司炸雞搭配酸甜的優格醬超讚. (16) [Variety]: 美味 太好吃子. (17) [Variety]: 這是韓國人超喜歡的吃法！蠻多品牌提供這種醬料. (18) [Variety]: 在家裡可以自己做看看. (19) [Variety]: 9.5/10. (20) [Variety]: 最後一個吃法是 韓國某一個城市的傳統吃法! (21) [Variety]: 我介紹那個之前我先告訴大家最重要「超美味吃法」...就是...用優惠價吃韓式炸雞!. (22) [Variety]: 省錢吃多好吃啊. (23) [Slogan]: 我現在每次吃韓式料理 都能拿到最高10%回饋. (24) [Logo]: 台新銀行. [Slogan]: 有台新銀行太陽卡/玫瑰卡就OK. (25) [Slogan]: 目前期間限定「韓瘋刷」指定韓系消費. (26) [Slogan]: 在韓國當地使用韓瘋刷 CU、GS25 最高10%回饋. (27) [Slogan]: OLIVE YOUNG 最高5%回饋. (28) [Slogan]: 除了我現在吃的BBQ之外 還有韓式鍋物、咖啡廳、烤肉 最高10%回饋. (29) [Slogan]: 韓系旅遊、美妝、娛樂 都可以拿到回饋. (30) [Slogan]: 海外刷卡免切換 最高3.3%回饋無上限. (31) [Slogan]: 24吋質感行李箱 台新信用卡新戶. (32) [Slogan]: 5. 包生菜吃. (33) [Variety]: 在韓國被叫做美食城市的「光州」. (34) [Variety]: 超級清爽!!!. (35) [Variety]: 8/10.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight dark hair, wearing a light pink short-sleeved polo shirt. She has neat makeup and a friendly, expressive face.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting with warm lighting for the eating segments, a storefront of a fried chicken shop, and digital app interfaces/promotional graphics.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with upbeat, electronic pop music. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice greets the audience. There is a distinct 'pop' sound effect as text overlays appear. (2) Loud, crisp crunching sounds occur as the speaker bites into fried chicken. This is followed by a short 'ding' sound effect. The BGM remains steady in the background. (3) A series of 'whoosh' sounds mark rapid scene transitions. The narrator's speech rate increases while describing the spicy noodles, punctuated by more eating and slurping sounds. (4) Digital UI 'click' sound effects are heard as screen recordings are shown. The narrator adopts a slightly more informational yet still upbeat tone to explain credit card benefits. (5) In the outdoor segment, faint urban ambience is audible beneath the narration and BGM. There's a sound of a bag rustling. (6) The video ends with a final 'pop' SFX and a playful vocal sign-off as the music reaches its resolution.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Tips -> Advertisement -> Tip -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote Taishin Bank's 'Sun' and 'Rose' credit cards by leveraging the popularity of Korean food and culture, specifically showing how to eat fried chicken in 'authentic' ways while highlighting rewards for spending in Korea.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator holds a Taishin Bank credit card and explicitly discusses its reward percentages at specific Korean retailers and restaurants.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced social media ad that blends mukbang content with financial services promotion.
